overview: Single independent Go service with no dependencies, so all work happens in one phase. Building the todo-api service covers persistence, HTTP handlers, and health checks in one cohesive unit.

phases.name: Foundation Service
phases.description: Implement the sole todo-api service which has no dependencies.

components.name: todo-api
responsibilities: Expose REST endpoints to list, create, and delete todos
Persist todos to a JSON file with atomic writes
Guard concurrent access via sync.RWMutex and generate unique UUIDs
Provide /health endpoint and structured request/error logging
Return proper HTTP status codes and JSON content types
components.architectureContext: Standalone HTTP service on port 9090 serving external clients directly. No upstream or downstream services; only dependency is the local filesystem volume for JSON persistence.
keyConsiderations: Use atomic file writes (temp file + os.Rename) to prevent corruption
RWMutex to safely handle 50+ concurrent requests without duplicate IDs
Recover middleware for panics returning 500 with logging
Method-not-allowed responses must include Allow header
Default TODO_DATA_FILE to /data/todos.json and create dir if missing
components.apiContract:
openapi: 3.0.3
info:
  title: Todo API
  version: 1.0.0
  description: Minimal REST API for managing todos.
servers:
  - url: http://localhost:9090
paths:
  /health:
    get:
      summary: Health check
      responses:
        '200':
          description: OK
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                type: object
                properties:
                  status: { type: string }
  /todos:
    get:
      summary: List todos
      responses:
        '200':
          description: Array of todos
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                type: array
                items: { $ref: '#/components/schemas/Todo' }
    post:
      summary: Create todo
      requestBody:
        required: true
        content:
          application/json:
            schema:
              type: object
              required: [title]
              properties:
                title: { type: string }
      responses:
        '201':
          description: Created
          content:
            application/json:
              schema: { $ref: '#/components/schemas/Todo' }
        '400':
          description: Bad request
          content:
            application/json:
              schema: { $ref: '#/components/schemas/Error' }
  /todos/{id}:
    delete:
      summary: Delete todo
      parameters:
        - in: path
          name: id
          required: true
          schema: { type: string }
      responses:
        '204': { description: Deleted }
        '404':
          description: Not found
          content:
            application/json:
              schema: { $ref: '#/components/schemas/Error' }
components:
  schemas:
    Todo:
      type: object
      properties:
        id: { type: string }
        title: { type: string }
        completed: { type: boolean }
        createdAt: { type: string, format: date-time }
    Error:
      type: object
      properties:
        message: { type: string }
